name: Tomato Scrapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the stewed tomatoes, chopped onion, and chopped carrot with the cornmeal, sugar, salt, and pepper until well combined.
2. Cook the mixture slowly over low heat until it thickens, about 1 hour.
3. Stir in the chopped peanuts.
4. Pack the mixture into an oiled pan or baking powder tin.
5. Allow to cool completely.
6. Slice the packed mixture thinly and fry in a small amount of fat.
This recipe was originally prepared using fresh stewed tomatoes and may have been adjusted for salt content by hand. It could be adapted today by using canned stewed tomatoes, reducing salt, and packing it into a sprayed glass pie pan or casserole dish. Some cooks might also save large cans used for baking powder to store their scrapple.
